# Data Integrity Checklist: Runtime Inventory and Constraints

**Purpose**: Validate that XPLAT-001 requirements and plan preserve inventory
coverage, classification, traceability, and handoff integrity before tasks.
**Created**: 2026-06-25
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based
on feature context and requirements.

## Inventory Row Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are inventory row requirements defined for source evidence, runtime relevance, owner bucket, follow-up spec, active runtime status, and classification rationale? [Completeness, Spec FR-004]
- [x] CHK002 Are `classification` and `active_runtime_status` defined as separate required axes so physical source type cannot be conflated with runtime proof state? [Clarity, Spec FR-002, Clarifications Session 1]
- [x] CHK003 Is the required durable report location specified as Markdown under `docs/ai/research/` with structured tables and owner buckets? [Completeness, Spec FR-013, Plan Summary]
- [x] CHK004 Are required summary counts specified for every classification, active runtime status, owner bucket, and follow-up spec used in the report? [Measurability, Spec FR-005, SC-004]

## Runtime Evidence Integrity

- [x] CHK005 Is static invocation-trace evidence required before any row can be marked `proven-active-runtime`? [Clarity, Spec FR-003, SC-002]
- [x] CHK006 Does the data model make `invocation_trace` required for `proven-active-runtime` rows and require an evidence gap for `unproven-active-runtime` rows? [Completeness, Data Model Inventory Finding]
- [x] CHK007 Are active runtime traces scoped to installed skills, agents, hooks, generated payloads, or other installed plugin surfaces rather than raw text matches? [Coverage, Spec Clarifications Session 1, Plan Inventory Method]
- [x] CHK008 Are mixed-mode helpers required to be split or owned at row level by traced invocation mode instead of maximum helper capability? [Consistency, Spec Edge Cases, Clarifications Session 2]

## Whole-Repo Coverage Integrity

- [x] CHK009 Is the scan boundary defined as tracked text files including hidden tracked paths, `dist/**`, public docs, tests, fixtures, and archive reports? [Completeness, Spec FR-001, Clarifications Session 1]
- [x] CHK010 Are explicit exclusions limited to `.git/`, binary assets, untracked files, vendor caches, and non-text inputs with rationale? [Clarity, Spec Clarifications Session 1, Plan Scale/Scope]
- [x] CHK011 Is the acceptance target stated as 100% of scoped scan matches represented in the report or explicitly excluded with rationale? [Measurability, Spec SC-001]
- [x] CHK012 Does the plan require recording exact scan commands in the report so reviewers can reproduce coverage claims? [Traceability, Plan Inventory Method, Verification Plan]

## False-Positive Boundary Integrity

- [x] CHK013 Are public documentation matches classified as `public-docs-claim` unless linked to a separate active-runtime finding with invocation-trace evidence? [Clarity, Spec Edge Cases, Clarifications Session 1]
- [x] CHK014 Are tests, fixtures, and expected-output references explicitly prevented from becoming active runtime blockers without invocation-trace evidence? [Coverage, Spec User Story 1 Acceptance Scenario 3, Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK015 Are generated `dist/**` payload rows treated as generated references with source links where possible and not as authoritative edit targets? [Consistency, Spec Clarifications Session 2, Plan Phase 1 Design]
- [x] CHK016 Are historical and archive references represented as evidence-only classifications rather than active runtime dependencies unless separately traced? [Coverage, Spec FR-007, Data Model Classification Values]

## Handoff and Follow-Up Integrity

- [x] CHK017 Are owner buckets constrained to the accepted XPLAT handoff and exclusion set, including documented exceptions only when no honest bucket applies? [Clarity, Spec Clarifications Session 2, Data Model Owner Buckets]
- [x] CHK018 Are `follow-up-exception` rows required to include reason, evidence gap, expiry or removal condition, and named follow-up decision? [Completeness, Spec Clarifications Session 2, Data Model Owner Buckets]
- [x] CHK019 Are active installed-runtime findings mapped to later XPLAT owner specs without selecting or implementing a runtime replacement in XPLAT-001? [Consistency, Spec FR-006, FR-010, FR-011]
- [x] CHK020 Are repository-only tools excluded from XPLAT-005, XPLAT-006, or XPLAT-007 ownership unless installed-runtime invocation evidence exists? [Coverage, Spec Clarifications Session 2, Plan Inventory Method]

## Rubric Data Integrity

- [x] CHK021 Are runtime rubric requirements limited to non-scoring gates, numeric weights totaling 100, and evidence targets for XPLAT-002? [Consistency, Spec FR-008, SC-005]
- [x] CHK022 Are supply-chain rubric requirements limited to non-scoring gates, numeric weights totaling 100, and artifact/control evidence targets for XPLAT-003? [Consistency, Spec FR-009, SC-006]
- [x] CHK023 Is candidate scoring, ranking, winner selection, required runtime choice, and required security-control selection explicitly prohibited? [Clarity, Spec FR-010, SC-007]
